name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Miami, FL's Cash America Pawn on Bird Rd offers fast pawn loans and buying services for jewelry, electronics, and collectibles.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn on Bird Rd in Miami, FL is a standalone pawn shop conveniently located in the city's central retail area. The store is open Monday through Saturday from 9 AM to 6 PM, closed Sundays, making it accessible for Miami residents and visitors stopping by during their errands. With straightforward parking access and a welcoming interior, this Bird Rd location serves customers seeking fast cash solutions in FL.

At this Miami location, you can pawn or sell jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, tools, watches, and collectibles for immediate cash. The shop evaluates items on-site and offers competitive loan terms without credit checks. For questions about current pawn rates, accepted items, or estimated values for what you're bringing, call +1 305-551-0787 to reach the Bird Rd location directly.

If you're a Miami resident needing quick cash without a lengthy application process, this pawn shop on Bird Rd is a practical neighborhood option. Bring a valid ID and your item for a straightforward in-person evaluation. Cash America Pawn has been serving Miami customers with fair valuations and transparent lending terms.
pros: Over 3,300 pawn store locations providing convenient access across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, and Latin America
Non-recourse pawn loans mean borrowers are not personally liable beyond forfeiture of pledged collateral
Fast cash access with on-the-spot payments for items sold and immediate loan funding
Accepts diverse collateral including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and instruments
Layaway service available with only 10% down payment for budget-conscious shoppers
Gold and precious metals buying program for consumers needing immediate cash from valuables
Large inventory of retail merchandise available for purchase at pawn locations
cons: Risk of losing valuable personal property if pawn loan cannot be repaid by maturity date
Pawn loans require physical collateral with meaningful resale value, limiting accessibility for those without valuable items
Layaway service charges 10% upfront cost in addition to purchase price
Interest rates and loan terms not disclosed on website, requiring in-store inquiry
Pawn model primarily serves short-term cash needs rather than building credit or long-term financial stability
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash who have valuable items to pledge and want to avoid traditional credit
Individuals without established credit history or access to bank loans who need short-term funding
People shopping for discounted merchandise, electronics, or jewelry at pawn retail locations
Those with gold, silver, or platinum items they can sell for immediate cash needs
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers facing immediate cash needs who own valuable collateral and want to avoid traditional credit channels, but should understand they risk losing pledged items if unable to repay. The service is a legitimate short-term liquidity solution rather than a credit-building or long-term financial strategy.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (non-recourse)
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, and sporting goods
Gold and precious metals buying with cash-on-the-spot payment
Layaway service with 10% down payment plans
Retail finance payment solutions through partner network
Store locator service to find nearest location
meta_description: Cash America Pawn at 8391 Bird Rd, Miami, FL. Fast pawn loans and buying for jewelry, electronics, and collectibles.
